name: xf_cep_ex_order_widen_exposed
drl: rule R when exists D(tag == "x") P() then end
comment: OPEN (D-161, the widen-exposed order case): pre-widen this PASSED by mechanism-luck - the eager per-arrival flush satisfied at the first D#x's insert and drained the P backlog in the oracle's arrival order; that D is annihilated by its same-epoch delete under the D-161 lazy staging (correctly - the D-159 semantics), so the satisfy moves to the fire eval whose drain order is the OPEN ex8/D-162 family bug (newest-first vs oracle arrival-FIFO: engine [4,..] vs oracle [1,..], ORDER-only). Closes with xf_cep_ex_backlog_order. ⇒ D-162 GRADUATED: the ENGINE PORT LANDED (quiescence eval + PxShadow — see xf_cep_ex_backlog_order). The D-161-exposed fire-eval satisfy drain now emits the machine order (the annihilated first witness leaves the staged batch intact; the surviving satisfy emits staged-arrival ++ reversed(rtm)).
